creator: gerald@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

lang/gcc42 (and lang/gcc43) no longer come with Java support and do not 
feature this OPTION any more and gcc42-withgcjawt is gone in consequence. 
I believe few, if any, users are choosing this option with lang/gcc44 
which still has it and we should consider removing it. 

Kyryll, what do you think?  Any feedback? 

(Maho-san sadly does not seem to have time to work on this, so closing 
on his behalf.)
